name: Egg Salad with Leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or bowl, finely mash the hard-cooked eggs. Add mayonnaise, yogurt, dill, pepper, and salt to taste; mix well.
2. Serve immediately, or cover and chill for up to one day.
3. Arrange lettuce leaves on a platter and place egg salad in a small bowl. Serve leaves on plates and top with salad, or scoop salad onto leaves and hold to eat. Makes 2 1/2 cups.
